name: chokepoint-remote-execution-emulation
description: IPC$ connection, random service creation, cmd recon. Expected: WEL 4624 (LogonType 3), 7045 (service install), EID 1 (cmd.exe).

detectionQueries.name: Network Logon Type 3
detectionQueries.query: SecurityEvent | where EventID == 4624 | where LogonType == 3 | where IpAddress != '-' | project TimeGenerated, Computer, AccountName, IpAddress, LogonType

detectionQueries.name: Service Installation
detectionQueries.query: SecurityEvent | where EventID == 7045 | project TimeGenerated, Computer, ServiceName, ServiceType, ImagePath, AccountName

detectionQueries.name: CMD Reconnaissance
detectionQueries.query: DeviceProcessEvents | where Timestamp > ago(1h) | where FileName == 'cmd.exe' | where ProcessCommandLine has_any ('whoami', 'hostname', 'ipconfig', 'net user', 'net localgroup') | project Timestamp, DeviceName, ProcessCommandLine
